description_for_human: Create and edit Microsoft Word documents in the signed-in user's OneDrive / SharePoint through the WorkIQ Word MCP (agent365), proxied by the Probation Tracker MCP server using On-Behalf-Of.

functions.name: CreateDocument
functions.description: Create a new Word document in the root of the signed-in user's OneDrive. Provide a fileName (may be empty for auto-generated Document_yyyyMMdd_HHmms.docx) and contentInHtml (HTML or plain text body). Optional shareWith email address shares the doc with that person. Returns the created DriveItem JSON from Microsoft Graph (driveId, documentId, webUrl).

functions.name: GetDocumentContent
functions.description: Fetch the contents of a Word (DOCX) document from OneDrive or SharePoint given its sharing URL. Returns a JSON payload with filename, size, driveId, documentId, plain text content, and all comments in the document. Input must be the SharePoint or OneDrive sharing link.

functions.name: AddComment
functions.description: Add a new comment to a Word document. Requires driveId, documentId, and the comment text.

functions.name: ReplyToComment
functions.description: Reply to an existing comment in a Word document. Requires commentId, driveId, documentId, and the reply text.
